arrival.title: Welcome
arrival.description: Villa Gloria al Padre welcomes you with a traditional natural stone facade, lush gardens and private parking. From the moment you arrive, you know: your holiday has begun.

pool.title: Pool & Terrace
pool.description: The heart of the villa: a 12×8 m pool with panoramic views of the sea and the Istrian countryside. Sun loungers, outdoor shower and covered BBQ area invite you to linger.

living.title: Living & Dining
living.description: The open ground floor connects living room, dining area and fully equipped kitchen. Wooden beams, large windows, air conditioning and a ceiling fan create Mediterranean flair.

kitchen.title: The Kitchen
kitchen.description: Cook like you're on holiday: gas stove, spacious worktop and everything you need. Direct access to the terrace makes breakfast by the pool an experience.

bedrooms.title: Bedrooms
bedrooms.description: Three bedrooms in the main house – with air conditioning in the hallway, premium mattresses and plenty of natural light. All windows fitted with fly screens. Each room is a retreat in itself.

bathrooms.title: Bathrooms
bathrooms.description: Ground floor bathroom with shower, WC, basin, washing machine and hairdryer. Upper floor bathroom with shower, WC, bidet, basin and hairdryer.

apartment.title: The Pool Apartment
apartment.description: On the lower level: a self-contained apartment with bedroom, sofa bed, kitchenette with dishwasher and private bathroom – perfect for adults and children or as a separate holiday flat in low season.

garden.title: Garden & Sports
garden.description: 1,000 m² of fully fenced grounds with volleyball/badminton court, basketball hoop, rose pavilion and covered BBQ area. Endless space – for children and adults alike.
